message:
refactor(cli): Add environment injection for improved testability

Introduces optional environment object parameter across credential and
API client modules to enable proper unit testing without global state:

credentials.ts Changes:
- getCredentialsPath(env) - reads XDG_CONFIG_HOME and HOME from env param
- getConfigDir(env) - passes env to getCredentialsPath
- loadCredentials(env) - passes env to path helpers
- saveCredentials(creds, env) - accepts env for path resolution
- All functions default to process.env when env not provided

api-client.ts Changes:
- ApiClient constructor accepts env option in ApiClientOptions
- Stores env internally, defaults to process.env
- baseUrl resolution reads JFP_PREMIUM_API_URL from injected env
- request() passes env to getAccessToken()
- isAuthenticated() passes env to getAccessToken()
- getUser() passes env to getCurrentUser()

This pattern enables tests to:
- Use isolated temp directories per test
- Control environment variables without affecting other tests
- Avoid race conditions in parallel test execution
- Test error paths without corrupting real credentials

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
